title: [CI:DOCS] typo
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body: thanks for contribute, your commit messages should change to include your `Sign-off-by: <xxx>`
do a `git commit --amend -s` and force push.

LGTM
other than the signature
Thanks for the PR!
Ah, the challenges of making an edit on a phone via the GitHub web UI! Will update with a signature when I'm on a computer later :)
Friendly ping @mattcen. Back at the computer?
Thanks for the ping, @vrothberg! Sorted now.

/lgtm
/approve

I am going to merge this because it is correct, but we could also point out that you could chown the volume to match the user inside of the container.

The :U  PR that has not been merged yet, would make this easier.

podman run -v ~/mydata;:/tmp/data:U --user foobar  

Will chown the mydata directory to match the foobar user inside of the container.

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
